## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and potential case studies for Hypermode, considering the upcoming end of their contract with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hypermode's contract with GrowthX is ending soon; no immediate plans to extend](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Limited customer base for case studies (fewer than 5-6 ideal candidates)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Shift in focus: Exploring CEO thought leadership content for Kevin on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Potential for future collaboration on LinkedIn audience growth and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Status and Limitations

  - [Few existing case studies: Pick Your Packer (startup), DeGraph (open-source project)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - Limited customer base for creating new case studies (\< 5-6 ideal candidates)
  - [Upcoming blog post for Pick Your Packer product launch (4-8 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [DeGraph: Open-source project, not primary IP for Hypermode](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Shifting product focus: Building on DeGraph for new project launch (next year)](https://fathom.video/share/u2tGzi7kKi7bZMyJrvgkfFSGTqMF6vGR?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
